body:
The workspace package-dependency graph is a governed architectural artifact.

Canonical package nodes in this repository are:

- `ssot-contracts`
- `ssot-views`
- `ssot-codegen`
- `ssot-core`
- `ssot-registry`
- `ssot-cli`
- `ssot-tui`

The currently governed dependency edges are:

- `ssot-views -> ssot-contracts`
- `ssot-codegen -> ssot-contracts`
- `ssot-codegen -> ssot-views`
- `ssot-core -> ssot-contracts`
- `ssot-core -> ssot-views`
- `ssot-cli -> ssot-contracts`
- `ssot-cli -> ssot-core`
- `ssot-tui -> ssot-contracts`
- `ssot-tui -> ssot-core`
- `ssot-registry -> ssot-contracts`
- `ssot-registry -> ssot-core`
- `ssot-registry -> ssot-cli`

Changes to workspace package nodes or dependency edges SHALL be treated as architectural changes and SHALL be reflected in SSOT documents and package manifests together.
summary: The workspace package-dependency graph is a governed architectural artifact with explicit nodes and directed edges.
title: Workspace package-dependency DAG
